stances.name: Bare Knuckle
lv25_bonus_extra: None

skills.name: Fireball
skills.description: Casts a devastating fireball that incinerates all enemies in its path.

skills.name: Burning Hands
skills.description: Increases Fire RES by imbuing Fire attribute to allies attack.

skills.name: Flame Ground
skills.description: Sets [Flame Ground] inflicting constant Fire ATK.

skills.name: Hell Breath
skills.description: To set enemies ablaze, it causes a jet of flame to burst forth from your hands.
skills.target: Up to 6 enemies 6m away and at an angle of 80 degrees

skills.name: Infernal Flames
skills.description: A pillar of Flames of Hell blazes up from the ground, incinerating all enemies within range.
skills.target: Up to 8 enemies within a range of 5m

skills.name: Meteor Strike
skills.description: Brings a blazing meteor down upon the heads of your enemies.

skills.name: Freezing Spear
skills.description: Creates a magical glacial spear that launches itself at enemies.
skills.target: Up to 3 enemies 8m away and within a 1.75m radius

skills.name: Chilling Touch
skills.description: Increases Ice RES by imbuing Ice attribute to allies attack.

skills.name: Frost Cloud
skills.description: By surrounding them with a cloud of ice, it freezes enemies.
skills.target: Up to 6 enemies 8m away and within a 3.5m radius

skills.name: Deluge
skills.description: Sets [Deluge] inflicting constant Ice ATK in the ground.

stances.name: Ultima

skills.name: Ice Prophecy
skills.description: Increase the power of Ice within the users bracelets but at a cost of the users lifeforce. In PvE, applies Lv. 12 [Flare] to self.

skills.name: Hail Madness
skills.description: Shoot a frozen chain of ice towards the enemy.

skills.name: Glaciere Grenade
skills.description: Throw a dense ball of ice filled with dark magic towards the enemy.
skills.target: Up to 10 enemies 10m away and within 3m width

skills.name: Ice Cataclysm
skills.description: Hurl spears of concentrated ice into the earth to release a cold shockwave.

skills.name: Endless Blizzard
skills.description: Concentrate a blizzard in a spot to freeze the enemy.
skills.target: Up to 10 enemies 15m away and within 7m width

lv25_bonus_extra: [RE: PvE] Skill DMG increases equal to 6% of extra [INT]
[PVP/PVE Maps] Additional 3% DMG according to extra [INT]
Ignore additional RES according to extra [INT] * 1

skills.name: Refriger Wave
skills.description: Freezes the ground under a group of enemies, inflicting ice damage.
skills.target: Up to 10 enemies 10m away and within 3m width

skills.name: Absolute Zero
skills.description: Powerful ice attack to one enemy.

skills.name: Blizzard
skills.description: Summons an ice storm that relentlessly attacks the enemy.

skills.name: Lightning
skills.description: Strikes an enemy with a bolt of lightning.

skills.name: Electric Charger
skills.description: Increases Lightning RES by imbuing Lightning attribute to allies attack.

skills.name: Shock Wave
skills.description: Electrocutes surrounding enemies by an electrical field.
skills.target: Up to 7 enemies within a range of 5m

skills.name: Tornado Holding
skills.description: Summon a [Tornado] to bombard enemies with lightning attacks.

skills.name: Thunderstorm
skills.description: Causes a thunderstorm to form over the caster, inflicting random lightning damage on enemies in the vicinity.

skills.name: Chain Lightning
skills.description: Conjure forth a bolt of chain lightning that leaps from one enemy to the next, inflicting lightning damage on the target and surrounding enemies.

skills.name: Enchanted Arm
skills.description: A spell that imbues your arm with the power of lightning. Effect disappears when stance changes.

skills.name: Hell Breath
skills.description: To set enemies ablaze, it causes a jet of flame to burst forth from your hands.
skills.target: Up to 6 enemies 6m away and at an angle of 80 degrees

skills.name: Absolute Zero
skills.description: Powerful ice attack to one enemy.

skills.name: Chain Lightning
skills.description: Conjure forth a bolt of chain lightning that leaps from one enemy to the next, inflicting lightning damage on the target and surrounding enemies.

skills.name: Elemental Strife
skills.description: To conjure forth a devastatingly potent attack, it combines the unique characteristics of the 3 elements.
skills.target: Up to 12 enemies within a range of 8m

stances.name: Activator

skills.name: Psychic Bomb
skills.description: Build a magical mine which blows enemy into the sky with a powerful psychokinetic attack.

Summons maximum 5 at the same time

skills.name: Diamond Spear
skills.description: Creates a magical glacial spear that launches itself at enemies.

skills.name: Lady Sasha Control
skills.description: Summon Lady Sasha. The frequency of using skills will increase by cheering up.

levels.value: Available to summon maximum 3 at the same time
Available to summon maximum 3 at the same time

special: Provides bonus ability to the doll according to skill level and SEN stats.
Provides bonus ability to the doll according to skill level and SEN stats.

skills.name: Voltage Shower
skills.description: Deliver a lightning attack in a wide range.

skills.name: Harsh Blaze
skills.description: Creates a fierce sweltering heat to blow enemies away.

lv25_bonus_extra: [RE: PvE] Skill DMG increases equal to 8% of extra [INT]
[PVP/PVE Maps] Additional 5% DMG according to extra [INT]
Ignore additional RES according to extra [INT] * 4

stances.name: Occult Magic

skills.name: Tenseness
skills.description: Deals damage with strong magnetic wave with attribute of holding weapon.
skills.target: Up to 18 enemies within a range of 6m

skills.name: Ice Vrille
skills.description: Creates a sharp ice pick in a straight line to pierce enemies from the bottom.
skills.target: Up to 12 enemies 15m away and within 5m width

skills.name: Breath of Fire
skills.description: Breathes strong fire to targets.

skills.name: Electric Bluster
skills.description: Creates a lightning ball and makes it explode to deal damage to enemy and nearby targets.

skills.name: Abyss Flare
skills.description: Concentrate the magic power into a single focal point, and deliver a great punch to the enemies.

lv25_bonus_extra: [RE: PvE] Skill DMG increases equal to 8% of extra [INT]
[PVP/PVE Maps] Additional 4% DMG according to extra [INT]
Ignore additional RES according to extra [INT] * 4
Additional DMG against [PC] + 1x
Additional DMG against Monster according to 4 * 50

skills.name: Absolute Zero
skills.description: Powerful ice attack to one enemy.

skills.name: Chain Lightning
skills.description: Conjure forth a bolt of chain lightning that leaps from one enemy to the next, inflicting lightning damage on the target and surrounding enemies.

skills.name: Tenseness
skills.description: Deals damage with strong magnetic wave with attribute of holding weapon.
skills.target: Up to 18 enemies within a range of 6m

skills.name: Barsel
skills.description: Accumulates mana and inserts it to the body to increase Magical ATK.

skills.name: Flare

stances.name: Elemental Master

skills.name: Elemental Spirit
skills.description: Absorbing elements energy, the body becomes stronger. Canceled in case of Stance change. [Elemental Control] rises to Max 50 and [Elemental Spirit] state appears every 3 levels.

skills.name: Vanishing Flare
skills.description: Throws a magic sphere of flame and electricity. The flame explodes and the electricity flows on the ground.

skills.name: Tornado Flare
skills.description: Ice vortex rages and lightning strikes.

skills.name: Misty Claymore
skills.description: The flame explodes in a wide misty place.

skills.name: Arch Spear
skills.description: Pour the whole power of Flame, Ice and Lightning to the enemy.

lv25_bonus_extra: [RE: PvE] Skill DMG increases equal to 8% of extra [INT]
[PVP/PVE Maps] Additional 4% DMG according to extra [INT]
Additional DMG against Monster according to 4 * 50

skills.name: Deep Straight
skills.description: Impales the enemy on a sword before delivering a powerful kick.

skills.name: Earth Tremor
skills.description: Plunges sword into enemy while airborne.

skills.name: Penta-Train
skills.description: A series of aggressive attacks that pushes the enemy back.

skills.name: Vortex Slash
skills.description: Make a series of fast and powerful attacks.

skills.name: Slash Down
skills.description: Delivers downward slashes.

skills.name: Guardian
skills.description: Focuses on Blocking to improve DEF. Canceled, if Stance changes.

skills.name: Pommel
skills.description: Strike the head of enemy with the pommel of sword repeatedly. It overwhelms the DEF of small or medium enemies, but is ineffective on large enemies.

skills.name: Stunning Skewer
skills.description: Stuns the enemy with a blow from the shield before advancing upon him with a sword.

stances.name: Crusader

skills.name: The Sieger
skills.description: Reduces Knockdown time by lowering body. Canceled, if Stance changes.

skills.name: Temple Breaker
skills.description: Hold the weapon with two hands and swing it horizontally.

skills.name: Defiant Aura
skills.description: Damages surrounding enemies by releasing the collected energy.
skills.target: Up to 8 enemies within a range of 8m

skills.name: Atomic Slash
skills.description: Strike down enemy with 5 strong attacks.

skills.name: Sacred Protection
skills.description: Adds the holy energy to the shield to increase DEF to Max. But, Movement Speed decreases. Cant use skill. Canceled, if Stance changes.
